title: Coordinate and monitor production performance
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Coordinate and monitor production performance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work in the production area

pcs.text: Identify work to be undertaken from the production plan and work program and confirm with supervisor if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work to be undertaken from the production plan and work program and confirm with supervisor if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work to be undertaken from the production plan and work program and confirm with supervisor if required.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Select, check and maintain tools and equipment suitable for the work to be undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and maintain tools and equipment suitable for the work to be undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and maintain tools and equipment suitable for the work to be undertaken.

pcs.text: Communicate and confirm understanding of the PPE and other safety requirements with staff and contractors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate and confirm understanding of the PPE and other safety requirements with staff and contractors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate and confirm understanding of the PPE and other safety requirements with staff and contractors.

elements.title: Monitor daily operations

pcs.text: Assess manure and litter consistency and treat to prevent deterioration, where appropriate

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess manure and litter consistency and treat to prevent deterioration, where appropriate.

pcs.text: Implement the designated lighting and internal environment programs for the production unit

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement the designated lighting and internal environment programs for the production unit.

pcs.text: Check effluent storage and disposal systems are operated according to the production program and manufacturer instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check effluent storage and disposal systems are operated according to the production program and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Check that all rubbish and used consumables are removed from production site according to the workplace procedures and the production program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check that all rubbish and used consumables are removed from production site according to the workplace procedures and the production program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that all rubbish and used consumables are removed from production site according to the workplace procedures and the production program.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that workplace, health and safety requirements are being observed and followed.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with operational staff and contractors to ensure smooth operation and progress.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle livestock using safe working methods according to animal welfare practices.
